message:
feat: add /install route to serve install script

Creates a redirect endpoint at /install that redirects to the raw
install.sh on GitHub. This enables the one-liner:

  curl -fsSL https://agent-flywheel.com/install | bash

The -L flag in curl follows the 302 redirect to GitHub seamlessly.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
+
+/**
+ * GET /install
+ *
+ * Redirects to the raw install.sh script on GitHub.
+ * This allows users to run: curl -fsSL https://agent-flywheel.com/install | bash
+ *
+ * The -L flag in curl follows redirects, so this works seamlessly.
+ */
+export async function GET() {
+  const scriptUrl =
+    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup/main/install.sh";
+
+  return NextResponse.redirect(scriptUrl, 302);
+}
